textByHashes.93937f147deeace42de76208f1904511a7eee2db: The Dark Altar powers the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.35be8ffb837b5cbe03bcbd299f77ba02b912ee61: It can be mined in Lovakengj.
textByHashes.eef63c0b6a378beb4fa09834c9059a8ac47da679: Pour it on the Doors of Dinh.
textByHashes.dd91150871ece46716714ca027e6e75609b5167d: We granted them knowledge. To give her more time.
textByHashes.d1f3a5857bd49084c48f6a054704a65c3986eaac: Time was what it was meant for. But time still runs out.
textByHashes.cd810af2a6243151febf4e5269798a0ae98610c8: This balance is what we serve.
textByHashes.c234f9b9257eeff22d3f606ca97acf1f261e850f: The people of Arceuus have had their time.
textByHashes.211cb40a07724b4a9937157565cb0dc3afd2d0d8: Interesting. Maybe the human is not as stupid as it looks.
textByHashes.5ef23ee8cd7c6cf927d8df52fa4e78d02b64ac24: We admit, the Arceuus people do have their uses.
textByHashes.fe4c08367c402f359242d6245e6deabee9ae08fe: We will help them. But first, you will serve us.
textByHashes.5b55810bcc54c08897ddb684d573bc5788e37b24: Free this soul. In return, we will provide our help.
textByHashes.9f5a1261a8cfc008b5eadd48fcd0e71bec3ff968: This is a soul. Trapped in this world, when it should have long departed.
textByHashes.1cac969635a2d7f19f7fcc095da5e41d3b0014d0: Which is why it falls to you.
textByHashes.7b592720260529f782c912dbce23f8be91231cd8: While you were busy, so were we.
textByHashes.155732db47c7ef9f1e4374920787c9b3921b4661: To a construct, built by a mortal.
textByHashes.b15ae271497132a8c56aad82d54e2cf934541d38: To a construct built by a mortal.
textByHashes.e7076eb4702ff276f06dddeb9dd18bf914a7f324: Without life, there is no anima.
textByHashes.b38e01d60f2a8bf4eff7b982401b3b751712577a: So we left our people. Left our home.
textByHashes.671f1131cdb8b533584b33f84f6bcd1ef5ca8e81: And move to the one beyond.
textByHashes.bcce9252288979af4e961f660f4938f82a6265de: Another could have filled your role.
textByHashes.b915380e729fb9fadb182615a3784f14da492fa5: An important task can still be menial.
textByHashes.a36bb4bbdaee4fce4f684794973243eeeb3ed21d: We had already committed to saving Arceuus.
textByHashes.4e7b96b4f88a681d37c08594d3d426025c4501d7: While we worked, you needed purpose.
textByHashes.bbce3c535f318a9bef8880f2080f3fee53acd588: But we will call on you again.
textByHashes.d00c8d8a279ff8f2c9178c69726c6ae8c17b2a9d: There is no need for action.
